sql.if: AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND s.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND s.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND s.area_id = #{areaId}) )

mapper.select:
SELECT AVG(i.traffic) as ave_flow, AVG(i.pressure) as ave_pressure, AVG(i.temperature) as ave_temperature, AVG(i.shake) as ave_vibration, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE(i.create_time)) * 1000 as time FROM inspection i INNER JOIN sensor s ON i.sensor_id = s.id
AND i.create_time >= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{startTime}/1000)
AND i.create_time <= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{endTime}/1000)
GROUP BY DATE(i.create_time), time ORDER BY DATE(i.create_time)
